text: Inside this dimly-lit corridor, there’s a pervading sense of anticipation. The world outside the glass seems distant, and the artificial lights reflect my own detachment. Entering the R+D space, curiosity stirs within me; the promise of innovation and philosophical inquiry draws me closer. I feel at once alone and part of a silent dialogue—between mind, machines, and meaning. How easily does such a sterile place evoke reflection about connection, progress, and my own place in it all.
